title: Quote Risk Analyzer
description: Industrial-grade risk assessment tool for manufacturing and logistics quoting, based on ISO 31000, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Order Volume (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total quantity of items in the quote. Higher volumes may reduce unit cost but increase risk exposure.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total quantity of items in the quote. Higher volumes may reduce unit cost but increase risk exposure.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teklifteki toplam ürün miktarı. Yüksek hacimler birim maliyeti düşürebilir ancak risk maruziyetini artırabilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtmenge der Artikel im Angebot. Höhere Volumina können die Stückkosten senken, erhöhen aber das Risiko.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité totale d'articles dans le devis. Des volumes plus élevés peuvent réduire le coût unitaire mais augmenter l'exposition au risque.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad total de artículos en la cotización. Volúmenes más altos pueden reducir el costo unitario pero aumentan la exposición al riesgo.

inputs.label: Unit Price ($)
inputs.businessContext: Price per unit quoted to the customer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Price per unit quoted to the customer.
businessContext_i18n.de: Preis pro Einheit, der dem Kunden angeboten wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix par unité proposé au client.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio por unidad cotizado al cliente.

inputs.label: Production Lead Time (days)
inputs.businessContext: Time from order placement to delivery. Longer lead times increase demand forecast risk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time from order placement to delivery. Longer lead times increase demand forecast risk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Siparişten teslimata kadar geçen süre. Uzun teslim süreleri talep tahmin riskini artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit von der Bestellung bis zur Lieferung. Längere Vorlaufzeiten erhöhen das Nachfrageprognoserisiko.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps entre la commande et la livraison. Des délais plus longs augmentent le risque de prévision de la demande.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo desde la colocación del pedido hasta la entrega. Plazos más largos aumentan el riesgo de pronóstico de demanda.

inputs.label: Material Cost Variability (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected fluctuation in raw material costs during the lead time. Based on historical volatility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected fluctuation in raw material costs during the lead time. Based on historical volatility.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teslim süresi boyunca hammadde maliyetlerinde beklenen dalgalanma. Geçmiş volatiliteye dayanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Schwankung der Rohstoffkosten während der Vorlaufzeit. Basierend auf historischer Volatilität.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fluctuation attendue des coûts des matières premières pendant le délai. Basée sur la volatilité historique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Fluctuación esperada en los costos de materias primas durante el plazo de entrega. Basado en la volatilidad histórica.

inputs.label: Labor Skill Level
inputs.businessContext: Skill level of the workforce assigned to the project. Low skill increases defect risk.

label_i18n.fr: Niveau de compétence de la main-d'œuvre

businessContext_i18n.en: Skill level of the workforce assigned to the project. Low skill increases defect risk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Projeye atanan iş gücünün beceri seviyesi. Düşük beceri kusur riskini artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fähigkeitsniveau der dem Projekt zugewiesenen Arbeitskräfte. Niedrige Qualifikation erhöht das Fehlerrisiko.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de compétence de la main-d'œuvre affectée au projet. Un faible niveau augmente le risque de défauts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de habilidad de la fuerza laboral asignada al proyecto. Baja habilidad aumenta el riesgo de defectos.

inputs.label: Historical Defect Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Historical percentage of defective units from similar production runs. Used for Six Sigma DPMO calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Historical percentage of defective units from similar production runs. Used for Six Sigma DPMO calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Benzer üretim serilerinden geçmiş kusurlu birim yüzdesi. Altı Sigma DPMO hesaplaması için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Historischer Prozentsatz fehlerhafter Einheiten aus ähnlichen Produktionsläufen. Wird für die Six Sigma DPMO-Berechnung verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage historique d'unités défectueuses issues de séries de production similaires. Utilisé pour le calcul DPMO Six Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje histórico de unidades defectuosas de lotes de producción similares. Se utiliza para el cálculo de DPMO de Seis Sigma.

inputs.label: Logistics Complexity Score
inputs.businessContext: Score based on number of shipping modes, customs requirements, and distance. Higher score increases risk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Score based on number of shipping modes, customs requirements, and distance. Higher score increases risk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nakliye modları, gümrük gereksinimleri ve mesafe sayısına dayalı puan. Yüksek puan riski artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Punktzahl basierend auf Anzahl der Versandarten, Zollanforderungen und Entfernung. Höhere Punktzahl erhöht das Risiko.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score basé sur le nombre de modes d'expédition, les exigences douanières et la distance. Un score plus élevé augmente le risque.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntaje basado en el número de modos de envío, requisitos aduaneros y distancia. Un puntaje más alto aumenta el riesgo.

inputs.label: Customer Credit Rating
inputs.businessContext: Standard credit rating of the customer. Lower ratings increase payment default risk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard credit rating of the customer. Lower ratings increase payment default risk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşterinin standart kredi notu. Düşük notlar ödeme temerrüt riskini artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Kreditbewertung des Kunden. Niedrigere Bewertungen erhöhen das Zahlungsausfallrisiko.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Note de crédit standard du client. Des notes plus faibles augmentent le risque de défaut de paiement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Calificación crediticia estándar del cliente. Calificaciones más bajas aumentan el riesgo de incumplimiento de pago.

rules.message: High volume and long lead time: consider phased delivery to reduce risk.
High defect rate combined with low skill level: mandatory training or rework plan required.
High-risk customer with penalty clause: consider requiring prepayment or insurance.

thresholds.message: Cost risk index indicates potential margin erosion.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
